softWarnings: [library-bound-css] chat.html: Library-bound mode discourages custom CSS class definitions in <style> blocks (.app-shell, .sidebar, .sidebar-brand, .brand-kicker, .brand-name, .sidebar-nav, .nav-section-label, .nav-item). Prefer Tailwind utilities plus Library brand CSS variables/component JSON instead.
